set -a && source .env && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "select source, last_file, last_position, last_timestamp from ingestor_cursors order by source;"
sigwatch_HL_COINS=BTC sigwatch_CAPTURE_MAX_FRAMES=5 sigwatch_CAPTURE_OUTPUT="/tmp/hl-fixtures.jsonl" cargo run -p sigwatch-hl-client --example capture_fixtures
sigwatch_IMAGE=ghcr.io/example/sigwatch:test docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.production.yml config >/tmp/sigwatch-compose.txt && wc -l /tmp/sigwatch-compose.txt

sigwatch_SIGNAL_SOURCE=hyperliquid sigwatch_STORAGE_BACKEND=memory sigwatch_HL_COINS=BTC,ETH,SOL cargo run -p sigwatch-signal-daemon > "/tmp/sigwatch-live.log" 2>&1 & DAEMON_PID=$! && sleep 25 && cargo run -p sigwatch-admin-cli -- status && cargo run -p sigwatch-admin-cli -- events --limit 5 && STATUS=$?; kill $DAEMON_PID; wait $DAEMON_PID; exit $STATUS

sigwatch_STORAGE_BACKEND=memory cargo run -p sigwatch-signal-daemon > "/tmp/sigwatch-longscore.log" 2>&1 & DAEMON_PID=$! && sleep 130 && cargo run -p sigwatch-admin-cli -- evaluate --limit 2000 --horizons 1 --fee-bps 2; STATUS=$?; kill $DAEMON_PID; wait $DAEMON_PID; exit $STATUS

sigwatch_STORAGE_BACKEND=memory cargo run -p sigwatch-signal-daemon > "/tmp/sigwatch-signalcheck.log" 2>&1 & DAEMON_PID=$! && sleep 65 && cargo run -p sigwatch-admin-cli -- signals && cargo run -p sigwatch-admin-cli -- evaluate --limit 1000 --horizons 1,5 --fee-bps 2; STATUS=$?; kill $DAEMON_PID; wait $DAEMON_PID; exit $STATUS
sleep 10 && wc -l /tmp/helm-engine.log && grep -c "HTTP Request: GET.*orders" /tmp/helm-engine.log && grep "trailing_stop\|action=\|WARNING\|ERROR" /tmp/helm-engine.log | tail -20

snip cat << 'EOF' > test.md
Redesign plan:
1. Chart on top.
2. Outcomes below chart.
3. Remove redundant headers.
EOF
snip git add scripts/deploy.sh && snip git commit -m "fix(ops): use local pm2 in deploy script" && snip git push origin main && snip git status --short --branch

snip node -e "fetch('https://api.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/info',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({type:'spotMeta'})}).then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const u=(j.universe||[]).find(u=>u.name==='@1035'||u.index===1035); console.log('spot_index_1035', JSON.stringify(u)); const all=j.universe||[]; console.log('sample', JSON.stringify(all.slice(0,3)))})"
snip pnpm check && snip pnpm build && snip pnpm test

snip python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone
print(datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
PY

source .venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/test_scanner.py tests/test_quote_engine.py tests/test_reward_controller.py tests/test_deployment_planner.py tests/test_reward_optimizer.py tests/test_allocator.py -q

sqlite3 /Users/devuser/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT data FROM part WHERE id = 'prt_cb9fc1204001jX7nn7eZomID5H';" | python3 -c "

"

sqlite3 /Users/devuser/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT data FROM part WHERE id = 'prt_cb9fe5047001K9sir0i9tsanNh'" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); o=d.get('state',{}).get('output',''); print(o[:5000])"

sqlite3 var/mktfarm.sqlite3 "SELECT date(created_at) as day, COUNT(*) as fills, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.maker_price') AS REAL) * CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.maker_size') AS REAL)), 0) as notional FROM event_log WHERE event_type='fill' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10;"
sqlite3 ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT json_extract(data, '$.role') as role, count(*) FROM message GROUP BY role"

sqlite3 ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT json_extract(p.data, '$.text') as text FROM part p JOIN message m ON p.message_id = m.id WHERE json_extract(m.data, '$.role') = 'user' AND json_extract(p.data, '$.type') = 'text' AND json_extract(p.data, '$.text') LIKE 'Please analyze this codebase and create an AGENTS.md%' LIMIT 1" 2>&1 | head -c 10000

sqlite3 ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db "SELECT json_extract(p.data, '$.text') as text FROM part p JOIN message m ON p.message_id = m.id WHERE json_extract(m.data, '$.role') = 'user' AND json_extract(p.data, '$.type') = 'text' AND json_extract(p.data, '$.text') LIKE 'You need to implement a complete visual redesign%' LIMIT 1" 2>&1 | head -c 10000

tmp=$(mktemp -d "/tmp/acme-wallet.XXXXXX") && pnpm --dir "$tmp" add viem@latest >/dev/null && TMP_WALLET_DIR="$tmp" node -e 'const { createRequire } = require("node:module"); const requireFromTmp = createRequire(`${process.env.TMP_WALLET_DIR}/package.json`); const { generatePrivateKey } = requireFromTmp("viem/accounts"); console.log(generatePrivateKey().slice(0, 4));'

uv run python - <<'PY'
import httpx
rows = httpx.get('https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/markets', params={'active':'true','closed':'false','limit':1}, timeout=30).json()

print(sorted(row.keys())[:80])
for key in ['question','endDate','end_date_iso','conditionId','condition_id','negRisk','enableOrderBook','liquidityNum']:
    print(key, row.get(key))
PY
